title: Site Intelligence Agent
description: RAG-based field service assistant with a 4-step confidence pipeline — LOW confidence skips the LLM entirely, because a hallucinated answer is worse than no answer.

title: MAGMA — Agentic Memory Architecture
description: Interactive demo of a 4-graph memory system (semantic, temporal, causal, entity) from a research paper — gamified 5-act mystery where you watch the agent walk live graph traversals.

title: CallingServices MCP
description: Python MCP server for ticket intake and routing — three tools, one prompt, one resource over the Model Context Protocol. Claude Desktop picks it up with a single config line.

title: Decision Intelligence Agent
description: Deterministic revenue classifier and marketing decision engine — deliberately no LLM in the core path. When revenue is healthy, it suppresses low-priority actions. Models the cost of acting.

title: Email Negotiation Coach
description: 3-step LLM chain that coaches negotiation — extract facts, diagnose gaps, generate questions. Deliberately does not draft replies. Human judgment stays in the loop by design, not by accident.

title: Case Studies Dashboard
description: Live React + Gemini 2.5 Flash dashboard for MBA case analysis. Tab-aware context: system prompt rebuilds per active tab so 'what does this chart mean?' works without confusion.

title: DTI × ServiceNow — Complexity Cliff
description: Cornell DTI × ServiceNow consulting engagement. Core finding: the #1 drop-off cause isn't model quality — it's the 'complexity cliff,' the moment a low-code tool hits a scripting requirement with no bridge.

title: LaTeX Resume Tailor MCP
description: MCP server with 5 post-LLM validation checks — never adds experiences, never removes metrics, never changes LaTeX structure. Reliability engineering for AI outputs.

title: Agent PM — Daily Brief Synthesizer
description: Claude-based agent that pulls from Canvas and Microsoft To Do, synthesizes them into a daily execution brief. Shows multi-connector agent design and tool orchestration.

title: Agentic Consulting Analyst
description: Full system design docs, evaluation framework, and LinkedIn carousel for an agentic consulting analyst. Consulting-grade problem framing for enterprise AI pitches.

title: Why I Design AI That Fails Gracefully
description: Most AI demos only show the happy path. This post explores why graceful degradation — knowing when NOT to answer — is the hardest and most important design decision in production AI.

title: The PM Communication Arc
description: What my writing looked like 18 months ago vs. now — and the specific things I changed. A meta-post on how communication skill compounds.

title: Learning: Model Context Protocol
description: Deep dive into MCP — from reading the spec to building two servers. What the protocol actually solves (custom glue code per-client) and where it falls short.

title: Learning: RAG Architecture Patterns
description: From naive retrieval to confidence-gated pipelines. What similarity thresholds actually mean, how to tune them against a ground-truth eval set, and when to skip the LLM entirely.

title: Testimonial
description: Social proof from collaborators, mentors, and teammates.
